title: ChatGPT提示词工程
prompt:
A cyberpunk flat vector illustration of an AI tutorial infographic, Xiaohongshu style, 3:4 aspect ratio (1080x1440).
Character: An Asian male programmer, 28 years old, short fluffy black hair with blue highlights, wearing black-framed glasses with slight blue light reflection, confident smile, round face. He wears a black hoodie with a glowing AI circuit icon (neon blue) on the chest, headphones around his neck. Cyberpunk flat illustration style with neon glow effects.
Layout: Character in center taking up 50% of the space. Top 15% has title banner. Bottom 20% has three horizontal data badges with neon blue borders.
Background: Dark theme (#0D1117) with tech grid lines and floating code snippets.

Render the following text EXACTLY as provided in Chinese characters. DO NOT translate to English. Use bold, clear sans-serif font with neon glow effect.
